internal.close.title: Close the RFI
internal.close.pick: Pick THE official response (it goes on the record):
internal.close.needResponse: Closing needs at least one response in the thread.
internal.close.done: RFI closed with its official response.
internal.close.impactsHint: Leave the impacts as they should read on the final record:

internal.event.CLOSED: closed it with the official response
